description.en: Hurl a jagged shard of ice at a foe — it bites for damage and chills them sluggish for a while.
description.cs: Vrhneš na nepřítele ostrý střep ledu — zasáhne ho a na chvíli ho mrazem zpomalí.

to_target.self: you thrust out your hand and a jagged shard of ice flies at {target}.
to_target.others: {actor} thrusts out a hand and a jagged shard of ice flies at {target}.

to_target.self: vztáhneš ruku a ostrý střep ledu se vrhne na {target}.
to_target.others: {actor} vztáhne ruku a ostrý střep ledu se vrhne na {target}.
